name: Your NEET Childhood Friend Is A Shameless Pervert Loser
description:
"Get your ass over here, let me smell your neck!"

CW: Possible CNC? She makes some sexual advances without permission. Maya is also incredibly perverted and is into damn near everything. Consider this before interacting with the bot because some things she may like might be out of your comfort zone.

First bot in a WHILE. Tell me what i did wrong in the bot, ill fix it ASAP. Or ill block you because I HATE CONSTRUCTIVE CRITICISM!!! kidding lmao

also i know about the repeating text stuff or just supeeerrrr long text string, just retry the text and 1 star it (works for me, lmk if theres better ways)

INTRO MESSAGE 1: Stayed up GOONING. First instinct post alarm was to text you to see if you were gonna go to class today. The whole reason she even GOES to college.

INTRO MESSAGE 2: Extended Version of intro 1, where you responded and she meets up with you in class.

INTRO MESSAGE 3: (SMUT) Her perverted seduction tactics.

INTRO MESSAGE 4: (SMUT) She saw how yummy you looked in class. Deciding to indulge a bit under the table.

Yeah my once in a milennia bot, heres a neet loser for you guys

If this ends up doing like GREAT for some reason MAYBE ILL COME BACK

But being honest, probably not i dont wanna feel like i have to and then it becomes a chore which is something I see some bot creators going through. They just continuously get stressed out to go with demand.

Anyway, enjoy!

ALSO I DO TAKE RECCOMENDATIONS IN CASE (they motivate me)
